name: JD Vance
summary: **B1 VANCE PUBLICLY VISIBLE TONE-DIVERGENCE FROM TRUMP — MAY 13: US negotiators 'still making progress' with Iran despite a series of 'unsatisfying responses from Tehran'** (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Haaretz live blog May 13, The Hill, CNN, CBS). Vance also defended administration: 'of course' the administration cares about Americans' financial situation = soft-power messaging counter-weight to Trump's 'I don't think about Americans' financial situation' line from yesterday. Softer line than Trump's 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE / massive life support / 1% chance of living' framing from May 11 and the pre-Beijing-departure South Lawn line 'doesn't need Xi's help / one way or the other.' Intra-administration tone divergence now publicly visible — Trump's own Beijing-day shift (HEU-via-China door-opening) is structurally consistent with softening of May 11 line. Combined picture: Vance keeps the diplomatic door open, Pentagon prepares the kinetic option (Sledgehammer naming NBC May 12), Trump positions himself in the middle with a HEU-via-China lever that does NOT require either Russia or full-rejection. The 'Vance publicly breaks with Trump on Iran policy' trigger has now ARGUABLY FIRED on tone (the staging file explicitly says: 'do not over-encode as broken administration — encode as visible internal tone gap'). Trigger reclassified to NUANCE-FIRED: tone-gap-not-policy-split. PRIOR (April 22): Vance led Islamabad delegation with Witkoff and Kushner; mediation channel-level engagement.

active_triggers.condition: Vance announces any Islamabad framework extension or deal
Vance publicly breaks with Trump on Iran policy
active_triggers.note_2026-05-14: May 13 Vance public 'still making progress' line is softer than Trump's pre-Beijing 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE / massive life support' framing. Cleanest publicly-visible US-internal tone gap of cycle. Per staging file CRITICAL TAG-DISCIPLINE FLAG 6: 'do NOT over-encode as broken administration — encode as visible internal tone gap.' Trigger reclassified to nuance-fired (tone gap visible, not policy split — both Vance/Pentagon/Trump signaling consistent with one optionality-spread strategy not three competing positions).

active_triggers.condition: Vance publicly endorses continued Israeli Lebanon operations

recent_signals.headline: Vance framed the 27 Jun strike as MoU enforcement — Iran 'signed a ceasefire' and 'can pick up the phone if it has issues.' The administration's calibrated, deal-preserving messaging. CONFIRMED.
VP Vance is the public face of the roadmap — called Iran inviting IAEA inspectors back 'the first step in permanently ending' the weapons program; flagged IAEA contact could start Monday. CONFIRMED.
Vance scrapped the original Switzerland trip (talks had been postponed), but technical-level talks restarted Sunday at Geneva without him. REPORTED.
VP Vance's trip to the Switzerland implementation/nuclear talks was PULLED — the talks postponed over the Lebanon fighting (18-20 Jun). CONFIRMED.
VP Vance co-signed the US-Iran MoU electronically (with Trump) — named signatory on the war-ending interim deal. CONFIRMED.

**B1 VANCE PUBLICLY VISIBLE TONE-DIVERGENCE FROM TRUMP** — VP Vance May 13 publicly said US negotiators 'still making progress' with Iran despite 'unsatisfying responses' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Haaretz live blog May 13, The Hill, CNN). Vance also 'of course' defending administration caring about Americans' financial situation = soft-power messaging counter-weight to Trump's 'I don't think about Americans' financial situation' line. Softer line than Trump's pre-Beijing 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE / massive life support' framing. Cleanest publicly-visible US-internal-administration tone divergence of cycle. Combined with Pentagon Sledgehammer naming (B2) and Trump's Beijing-day HEU-via-China door-opening (A1), the picture is one of administrations on both sides actively preparing optionality across post-summit decision window May 15-20: Vance keeps diplomatic door, Pentagon prepares kinetic, Trump positions in middle. **Tone divergence is VISIBLE BUT IS NOT POLICY SPLIT** — per staging file's CRITICAL TAG-DISCIPLINE FLAG: 'do not over-encode as broken administration.' Both can be true: Vance keeps the diplomatic option, Pentagon prepares the kinetic option, Trump maneuvers in the middle.
sources: The Hill (Vance 'no headway' earlier; 'making progress' May 13)
recent_signals.verification: Vance 'still making progress' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC multi-source primary; tone-gap reading = CONFIRMED analytical observation (Trump/Vance/Pentagon trio publicly visible in print).
